creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 2010/09/22, audio/linux-nerodigitalaudio moved to audio/linux-
neroaaccodec (ports/145094). Unfortunately, linux-neroaaccodec has never been added to audio/Makefile.

I'd like to add linux-neroaaccodec to audio/Makefile, any objections ?

(PR forwarded to pgollucci@, who handled the repocopy)
